landing.heroTitle: Turn a Google Sheet into a price calculator
landing.heroSubtitle: Paste a spreadsheet URL. Get a shareable, embeddable calculator — instantly. Your customers select options, you get the right price every time.
landing.callout: Each column in your sheet becomes a dropdown filter. Name your price column price — it becomes the result. Add a row → new option appears automatically.
landing.feature1Body: Paste the CSV export URL of any Google Sheet. Columns become filter dropdowns — automatically and in order.
landing.feature2Body: Each calculator gets its own URL. Embed it on your site, send it to customers, or use it internally.
landing.feature3Body: Upgrade to Pro: remove the watermark, apply your logo, and set your own accent color.
landing.ctaSubtitle: Free plan includes 3 calculators. No credit card required.

guide.step1Body: Your sheet is the source of truth. Each row defines one price combination. Every column except price becomes a filter dropdown — in column order. That last column is the calculated result.
step1Rules: Each unique row maps to one price.
Add a row to add a new option — no code changes needed.
guide.step2Body: Google Sheets can serve your data as a live CSV URL — this is what Prexario reads.
step2Steps: Open your sheet → File → Share → Publish to web
Select the sheet tab from the first dropdown
Choose "Comma-separated values (.csv)" from the second dropdown
guide.step3Body: In your dashboard, click "+ New Calculator", paste the CSV URL, give it a name, and click Create. Your calculator is live immediately at its own shareable URL.
